Class ChartBar

java.lang.Object
chart.ChartBar
public class ChartBar extends Object
Modern Bar Chart with enhanced styling and visual hierarchy Features: Modern colors, improved axis labels, better legend formatting

  • Method Details

    • createCategoryBarChart

      public static org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart createCategoryBarChart(Map<String,Double> categoryTotals, String title, String xLabel, String yLabel)
      Create category bar chart showing expense breakdown
      Parameters:
      categoryTotals - map of category to amount
      title - chart title
      xLabel - x-axis label
      yLabel - y-axis label
      Returns:
      styled JFreeChart

    • createMonthComparisonChart

      public static org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart createMonthComparisonChart(double month1Total, double month2Total, int month1, int month2, int year)
      Create month-to-month comparison bar chart
      Parameters:
      month1Total - expenses for first month
      month2Total - expenses for second month
      month1 - first month number
      month2 - second month number
      year - the year
      Returns:
      styled JFreeChart

    • createYearlyBarChart

      public static org.jfree.chart.JFreeChart createYearlyBarChart(Map<Integer,Double> yearlyTotals)
      Create yearly bar chart showing yearly trends
      Parameters:
      yearlyTotals - map of year to total expenses
      Returns:
      styled JFreeChart
